results.rendered_html:
vibhāvarī
1 Night; aparvāṇi grahakaluṣeṃdumaṃḍalā vibhāvarī kathaya kathaṃ bhaviṣyati  M. 4. 15 , 5. 7 ;  Ku. 5. 44. 
2 Turmeric.
3 A bawd.
4 A harlot.
5 A perverse woman.
6 A talkative woman (mukharastrī).
